text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Fan Fest. Meisho Doto is
supposed to participate in the scavenger hunt
relay race and the hide-and-seek competition...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaargh!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, it's Meisho Doto! Looks like she's just
dropped the cup she borrowed for the scavenger
hunt race!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it! It was just a cheap cup.
Here, use this one instead!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, s-s-sorry. I'm really, really, really sorry
about this...

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
But now she's ready to get back in the game!
She's passing on the baton—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Noooo!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text: She has not passed the baton!

The baton, unfortunately, did not survive Meisho
Doto's fall, placing her in dead last...

She flees in tears. I run around the campus
looking until I finally find her cowering in the
corner of the field.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Why... oh, why am I such a klutz? Everyone was
cheering me on, too...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If I'd held on to the cup and baton b-better... I
could have won!

She really is torn up over this... But there's still the
hide-and-seek match up next.

I'm about to encourage her to make the final
push, when...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'm... not going to let myself mess up!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've... b-been complimented on my hide-and-seek
skills before!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I used to always hide in corners to avoid
causing anyone trouble, so I think I know a thing
or two about hiding places!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. I'm going to do my best. I know I can.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: L-let's go!

She finds the strength in herself to get back on
her feet—to me, it's a sure sign of her growth.
Then, a few hours later...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now, I know you Mati-can't wait any longer! I'm
Matikanefukukitaru, and I'll be your host for this
hide-and-seek competition!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We have a lot of miraculous prizes prepared for
the successful seekers!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now, everyone, let's get ready, get set... aaand
go!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyah?! Wha-wha?! The game has already started!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But, but that's okay. Hiding here, at the very
least, I won't be the first one found!
However...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We're several hours into this hide-and-seek
extravaganza! The Fan Fest is about to wrap up,
but...

text_block_list.name: Doto's Fan A
text_block_list.text: Dotoooo! Where are yooouu?!

text_block_list.name: Doto's Fan B
text_block_list.text:
We've checked everywhere possible! I guess we'll
have to go around once more!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Doto has yet to be found! Even the rooftop,
everyone's last hope, was free of her presence!
But, we've got a schedule to follow, so...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It can't be argued otherwise—Doto is the winner
of the hide-and-seek competition!

text_block_list.name: Doto's Fans
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

The competition concludes with an unexpected
result.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm s-sorry... I'll try to hide somewhere more
obvious when next year comes...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But... actually... maybe let's not play
hide-and-seek next year...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Instead, I want to... have enough confidence to
talk with my fans...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
My fans put in so much effort to find me... I want
to repay them...

Despite the numerous slipups, it looks like this
experience with her fans has inspired Doto.

text_block_list.name: Doto's Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh, gotcha! I found you, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Doto's Fan A
text_block_list.text: Gyah! You're even cuter in real life!

text_block_list.name: Doto's Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I cheer you on in all your races! And I really
wanted to meet you today!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hyah?! Hyayayah! Wh-wh-wh-why are th-there so
many people now?!

The crowd continues to bring in more people, and
before she knows it, Meisho Doto is completely
surrounded!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hwaa!

I go in to pull her out, but by then, she's
completely exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm... okay. I was just surprised, that's all...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I didn't know I had so many fans... It c-caught me
off guard...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yet... it made me happy...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I feel power from each of my supporters... It's...
amazing.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But now my heart and body are all tuckered out... Sigh...

Despite her clumsy engagement with her fans, it
seems like the experience was very inspiring for
her.
